data.title: Kopin receives $1 million order for DarkWAVE™ Module from Theon International, a strategic partner in night-vision tech.
data.description: In Westborough, Massachusetts, Kopin Corporation revealed a significant advancement in launching its DarkWAVE™ Module by securing its first product order for the platform. Theon International, a renowned provider of night-vision and thermal imaging systems, and a key partner of Kopin, made a substantial move by placing a $1 million development order to facilitate this project. Kopin Corporation, known for its application-specific optical systems and high-performance microdisplays tailored for defense and enterprise purposes, is moving forward with this collaboration to bring the DarkWAVE™ Module to market successfully.

data.title: Retirees average $289,000 in savings but say $824,000 is needed for comfortable retirement. Many underestimate costs.
data.description: According to a recent survey, approximately 40% of retirees state that a minimum of $1 million is necessary to retire comfortably, with 92% indicating that the cost of a comfortable retirement is underestimated. As of January 13, 2026, in St. Louis, the average savings of an American retiree stands at $288,700. However, retirees feel that a significantly higher amount of $823,800 is required for a comfortable retirement.

data.title: BonBon introduces first chocolate bar, expanding viral Swedish candy movement, rooted in Scandinavian traditions.
data.description: BonBon has recently introduced its newest product, the Chocolate Wafer Bar, after years of development inspired by Scandinavian snack customs. The unveiling took place in New York on January 13, 2026. This launch comes amid an increasing popularity of Swedish candies in the U.S., with a surge in interest from consumers in Scandinavian confections. The Chocolate Wafer Bar is set to become a prominent addition to the BonBon product line as the company taps into this growing trend.

data.title: Solstice Advanced Materials investing $220M+ to expand ballistic fiber manufacturing in Chesterfield County, VA, creating 100 jobs.
data.description: A move to enhance the U.S. manufacturing of defense-critical materials and boost innovation has been announced by Solstice Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: SOLS). The expansion plan, set to take place in Morris Plains, New Jersey, is expected to create 100 full-time high-tech jobs. Solstice Advanced Materials is a key player in high-performance specialty materials worldwide.

data.title: Commvault introduces Unified Data Vault for S3 data with immutability, encryption, and policy governance. $CVLT #cloud #data
data.description: Commvault is offering developers the necessary tools to safeguard application and AI data stored on S3. The company, known for unified resilience, is providing features like immutability, encryption, and policy governance to ensure the protection of these datasets. This initiative comes as more businesses turn to S3 for data storage. This information was disclosed in Tinton Falls, New Jersey on January 13, 2026. Commvault, listed as NASDAQ: CVLT, is leading this effort with a focus on maintaining data security and integrity.

data.title: T. Rowe Price Group's assets reach $1.78 trillion in December 2025, with net outflows of $11.6 billion.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. disclosed that their assets under management at the end of December 2025 were approximately $1.78 trillion. The company reported net outflows of $11.6 billion for the month of December and $25.5 billion for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: IDEXX announces CEO succession, with Mike Erickson, PhD, becoming President and CEO on May 12, 2026, as Jay Mazelsky transitions to Executive Chair.
data.description: In Westbrook, Maine, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. promoted Michael Erickson, PhD, to President and CEO, effective May 12, 2026, taking over from Jonathan Mazelsky who will become the Executive Chair of the Board. Mazelsky will retire after the transition. IDEXX is a leading innovator in pet healthcare, listed on NASDAQ as IDXX. This change marks a significant shift in leadership for the company.

data.title: Humana partners with Atlas Oncology to expand cancer care for Medicare Advantage members in Tennessee and Mississippi.
data.description: Humana has recently broadened its cancer care services for eligible Medicare Advantage members in Tennessee and Mississippi by partnering with Atlas Oncology. This collaboration aims to enhance access to comprehensive cancer care for individuals covered under Humana's Medicare Advantage plans in these regions. Through this partnership, Humana members will have access to a wider range of oncology services and treatments to better address their healthcare needs. This initiative demonstrates Humana's commitment to improving the quality of care for its members facing cancer diagnoses in Tennessee and Mississippi.

data.title: New CO2 sensor by Senseair is 75% smaller with SMD-solderability, ideal for demand-controlled HVAC, boosting efficiency.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates in the United States. The latest data shows that the national unemployment rate has risen to 6.1%, reflecting a surge in job losses across various sectors. The number of unemployed individuals in the country now stands at over 9.8 million, with many struggling to find stable employment opportunities. This rise in unemployment is attributed to the ongoing economic challenges stemming from the global pandemic. As businesses continue to grapple with restrictions and closures, the job market faces continued uncertainty, leading to a growing number of individuals without work. The government is working to address these issues through various relief programs and initiatives aimed at supporting those affected by the economic downturn. With the situation evolving, many are hopeful for a turnaround in the job market and a decrease in unemployment rates in the near future.
